title: anguillaria excelsa
intro: Anguillaria excelsa, also known as Eclipta alba, is a perennial plant native to North America, used in traditional herbal medicine. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anguillaria excelsa include soothing skin irritations, promoting wound healing, and supporting liver health. Herbal preparations of Anguillaria excelsa include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various ailments.
